Quick Answer

What is Super Bear Adventure Mod APK?

The Super Bear Adventure Mod APK is a modified Android build aligned with official v12.1.5 (April 29, 2026). It gives unlimited coins, all skins and hats unlocked, no ads, and the same worlds as the Play Store game—including The Hive, Turtletown, and multiplayer.

Super Bear Adventure Mod APK is a tweaked Android version of the game that gives you unlimited coins, all skins unlocked, and no ads while keeping the same 3D worlds and story as the official release. The latest official build is v12.1.5 (April 29, 2026)—a multiplayer stability patch. Worlds like The Hive have been in the game since Update 10.0 (2022).

With our verified 2026 mod build you can skip weeks of grinding and jump straight into exploring with every shop item unlocked. This version gives you instant Unlimited Money and Gems. If you prefer playing on a bigger screen, follow our Super Bear Adventure for PC guide, or check the iOS mod guide if you're on iPhone or iPad. For older or low-end devices, see our old versions archive; to upgrade safely, read how to update without losing progress.

This page covers the modded version of Super Bear Adventure. For the official game maintained by Earthkwak Games, see the Google Play release.

Definition — Super Bear Adventure Mod APK

The Super Bear Adventure Mod APK is a modified Android version of the game. You get unlimited coins, all skins, and no ads from the start. The 3D platforming and exploration stay the same as the official v12.1.5 game on Google Play.

Key Takeaways

  • Latest official patches: v12.1.5 fixes multiplayer invite codes; v12.1.4 fixed save corruption (see changelog).

  • All 6 worlds included: Turtletown, Snow Valley, Beemothep Desert, Giant House, The Hive, and Mole Mines.
  • Full multiplayer support: Co-op play, invite codes, and online sessions work perfectly.

What is Super Bear Adventure? (A 90s Inspired Masterpiece)

Super Bear Adventure is a 3D platformer that feels like late 90s classics such as Banjo-Kazooie and Super Mario 64. You play as Baaren, a brave bear exploring the Kingdom of Earthkwak to save his friends from a toxic purple honey. The official game includes daily challenges, speedy vehicles, and fun mini-games in the Arcade World—our mod keeps all of that and removes ads and grind. For the full story, read our complete breakdown of the Kingdom of Earthkwak lore.

A True 3D Platforming Experience

Unlike most mobile platformers that rely on 2D side-scrolling, Super Bear Adventure gives you full 3D freedom. You can run, jump, climb, swim, and even drive vehicles across massive open-world environments. The game's physics engine allows for creative movement techniques like wall jumps, speed boosts, and hidden shortcuts that speedrunners love. Learn all the advanced techniques in our beginner guide.

Official Super Bear Adventure APK vs Mod APK

Understanding the difference helps you choose the right version. The official game on Google Play has over 100M+ downloads and a 4.4-star rating with 883K+ reviews. It's free but includes ads and requires grinding for coins to unlock cosmetics.

Official app on Play Store: 100M+ downloads, 4.4★ (883K+ reviews), PEGI 3. Store listing updated April 29, 2026. Developer: Earthkwak Games.

The Evolution of the Kingdom: 2024 vs 2026 Comparison

Comparing the older versions archive to the current build shows how far Earthkwak has taken the Kingdom of Earthkwak—from Update 10.0's The Hive (2022) to Update 12.0's multiplayer (2025) and the 12.1.x polish patches in 2026. The April 2026 v12.1.5 release is small but important for online play; major content drops were 12.1.0 (emotes, Super Bear Fighters) and 12.0.0 (co-op).

Why Experienced Players Prefer the Mod Version

In the normal game, rare skins like the Skeleton Bear or Royal Cape take thousands of Purple Coins and hours of grinding. The Super Bear Adventure Mod APK 2026 skips that. You can focus on secrets and exploring. To earn coins without the mod, see our guide on legal strategies to earn coins quickly.

What's New in v12.1.5 (Official 2026)

v12.1.5 Patch

Multiplayer invite codes fixed (official Apr 2026)

v12.1.4 Save Fix

Save corruption & invite copy/paste (official)

v12.1.0 Content

Emotes, Super Bear Fighters, arcade updates

  • v12.1.5: Fixed multiplayer invite codes (current Play Store version)
  • v12.1.4: New invite format, copy/paste invites, and fixes for save file corruption that could wipe progress
  • v12.1.3: Lobby version number display, timer fixes, and cosmetic fixes
  • Already in the game: The Hive (since 2022), multiplayer (since 12.0), and Super Bear Fighters (since 12.1.0)

For the complete history, see our version changelog archive.

Exclusive Features of the Modded Version

Unlimited Money and Purple Gems

You get unlimited coins and gems. Buy every hat, skin, and accessory whenever you want. Great if you want to enjoy the story without the coin grind.

Learn more

All Skins & Hats Unlocked

Access every cosmetic item from day one. Skeleton Bear, Royal Cape, and all rare skins included. No need to grind or pay.

See all skins

No Advertisements

Play without interruptions. Zero pop-ups, zero video ads, zero banner ads. Pure gameplay experience from start to finish.

Anti-Ban Protection

This build is set up to reduce the chance of in-game bans. Files are scanned with VirusTotal so they're clean. Only download from trusted sites.

The 6 Massive Worlds

Super Bear Adventure features six unique open-world environments, each with its own theme, enemies, secrets, and collectibles:

Turtletown

Your starting hub — a peaceful town with hidden areas and friendly NPCs.

Snow Valley

Icy peaks with snowboard sections and frozen puzzles.

Beemothep Desert

Ancient ruins, sand traps, and sphinx-inspired puzzles.

Giant House

Everything is oversized — navigate a world where you are tiny.

The Hive

A buzzing bee kingdom with honey-themed obstacles.

Mole Mines

Underground caverns with mining carts and gem puzzles.

How to Download and Install

1

Download the APK

Tap the Download button on this page to get the Super Bear Adventure Mod APK file.

2

Allow Unknown Sources

Go to Settings > Security > Enable "Install from Unknown Sources" or allow your browser to install APKs.

3

Install the APK

Open your file manager, find the downloaded APK, and tap to install.

4

Launch & Play

Open Super Bear Adventure and enjoy unlimited coins, all skins, and no ads!

Is the Mod Safe? (The Trust Factor)

We care about safety. Every file on this site is checked by us. We don't use unverified links.

VERIFIED SAFE

For Super Bear Adventure

  • Anti-Ban Protection: This build is set up to reduce the chance of in-game bans.
  • Security Scanning: Files are scanned with VirusTotal so they're clean.
  • No Root Required: Works on all standard Android devices.
  • No Personal Data: Does not access contacts, photos, or accounts.
  • Regular Updates: Always synced with official Earthkwak patches.

Optimization for Low-End Devices

If you experience lag or frame drops, check our optimization guide. The mod includes all the same graphics settings as the official game, so you can lower quality for smoother performance on older devices. Key tips:

  • Lower graphics quality in Settings
  • Close background apps before playing
  • Enable battery saver mode for consistent performance
  • Clear app cache periodically

Final Verdict & Conclusion

Super Bear Adventure Mod APK v12.1.5 is the definitive way to experience one of the best 3D platformers on mobile. With unlimited coins, all cosmetics unlocked, no ads, and full multiplayer support, you get the complete experience without the grind. Whether you're a returning player or discovering the Kingdom of Earthkwak for the first time, the mod gives you everything you need to dive right in and explore.

Ready to start? Download the mod from the button above and begin your adventure. For questions, visit our FAQ page or contact us.

Frequently Asked Questions

Is Super Bear Adventure Mod APK safe to install?
Yes, the mod APK has been scanned and verified. It does not contain malware, viruses, or any harmful code. We provide the cleanest possible build based on the official v12.1.5 release from Earthkwak Games.
Will I get banned for using the mod?
The mod includes anti-ban protection. Thousands of players use it daily without issues. However, we recommend using a secondary account for online multiplayer to be extra cautious.
Does the mod work on the latest Android versions?
Yes, the mod APK v12.1.5 is compatible with Android 5.1 and above, including Android 14 and 15. It works on all major phone brands including Samsung, Xiaomi, OnePlus, Pixel, and more.
Can I play multiplayer with the mod?
Yes! The mod retains full multiplayer functionality from the official game. You can play co-op with friends, use invite codes, and join online sessions just like the regular version.
What is included in the mod?
The mod gives you unlimited coins and gems, all skins and hats unlocked, no advertisements, all 6 game worlds accessible, full multiplayer support, and the same gameplay experience as the official v12.1.5 release.
How do I update the mod APK?
When a new version is available, download the latest APK from this page and install it over the existing one. Your progress will be saved. Read our update guide for step-by-step instructions.
Does it work offline?
Yes, you can play single-player mode completely offline. Multiplayer mode requires an internet connection, just like the official game.
Is root access required?
No, the mod APK does not require root access. It works on all standard Android devices without any special modifications.
What is the difference between the official APK and the Mod APK?
The official APK is the standard game from Google Play with ads and in-app purchases. The Mod APK removes ads, gives unlimited coins, unlocks all skins/hats, and keeps the same gameplay. See our detailed comparison table.
Can I install this on iPhone/iOS?
This APK is for Android only. For iOS devices, check our iOS mod guide for alternative methods.
